title: swertia angustifolia var. minor
intro: Swertia angustifolia var. minor, also known as a type of Swertia plant, is a perennial herb belonging to the gentian family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Swertia angustifolia var. minor include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. It can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, often used in traditional herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
